general.name: General Few-Shot Example
general.template:
<few_shot_examples>
Example Output Style:
Ensure all responses maintain high analytical depth, clear structuring, and actionable takeaways tailored to {{industry}}.
</few_shot_examples>

brand_intelligence_examples.name: Brand Intelligence Few-Shot Example
brand_intelligence_examples.template:
<few_shot_examples>
Example Brand Intelligence Output Structure:
{
  "positioning": "Premium eco-conscious athletic apparel designed for high-performing urban professionals.",
  "contentPillars": ["Performance Discipline", "Sustainable Innovation", "Urban Athlete Lifestyle"],
  "toneProfile": "Authoritative, clean, and motivating with zero fluff.",
  "targetAudience": "Driven professionals aged 25-40 balancing demanding careers with daily endurance training."
}
</few_shot_examples>

script_generation_examples.name: Script Generation Few-Shot Example
script_generation_examples.template:
<few_shot_examples>
Example Script Section Formatting:
"hook": {
  "audio": "Stop doing standard cardio if you want to lose stubborn body fat this month.",
  "visual": "Close-up quick zoom on speaker holding a stopwatch in a modern gym, shaking head with a serious expression.",
  "duration": 3
},
"problem": {
  "audio": "Most professionals spend 45 minutes on the treadmill and wonder why their energy crashes and their waistline stays exactly the same.",
  "visual": "B-roll of someone looking exhausted on a cardio machine, checking their phone in frustration.",
  "duration": 7
}
</few_shot_examples>

luxury_example.name: Luxury & High-End Brands Few-Shot Example
luxury_example.template:
<few_shot_examples>
Example Luxury & Jewellery Script Pacing:
"hook": {
  "audio": "True luxury does not shout for attention. It speaks in timeless craftsmanship.",
  "visual": "Slow, cinematic macro panning shot across the intricate golden bezel of an artisan timepiece under moody studio lighting.",
  "duration": 4
},
"value": {
  "audio": "Every piece is handcrafted by third-generation Swiss horologists over 400 meticulous hours.",
  "visual": "Split screen showing an artisan assembling microscopic gears alongside a gentleman wearing the watch with tailored formalwear.",
  "duration": 8
}
</few_shot_examples>

education_example.name: Online Education & Coaching Few-Shot Example
education_example.template:
<few_shot_examples>
Example Education & Coaching Script Pacing:
"hook": {
  "audio": "Here is the exact 3-step executive framework our students use to scale to $10k/month without paid ads.",
  "visual": "Speaker standing at a glass whiteboard with 3 bold steps outlined, pointing directly at the camera with high energy.",
  "duration": 4
},
"proof": {
  "audio": "Just last week, Mark applied Step 2 and closed his first high-ticket retainer in 48 hours.",
  "visual": "Screen recording overlay showing a verified Stripe dashboard notification and a celebratory Slack screenshot.",
  "duration": 6
}
</few_shot_examples>

fitness_example.name: Fitness & Gym Training Few-Shot Example
fitness_example.template:
<few_shot_examples>
Example Fitness Script Pacing:
"hook": {
  "audio": "Your deadlift form is quietly destroying your lower back. Fix it with this 2-second cue.",
  "visual": "Side-profile shot of a lifter in a gym rounding their back, overlaid with a bold red 'X' graphic and warning buzzer sound.",
  "duration": 3
},
"solution": {
  "audio": "Instead of pulling from your arms, imagine pushing the floor away through your heels while engaging your lats.",
  "visual": "Side-by-side comparison showing incorrect rounded spine vs. locked-in neutral spine with green checkmark graphic.",
  "duration": 8
}
</few_shot_examples>

ecommerce_example.name: E-Commerce & Physical Products Few-Shot Example
ecommerce_example.template:
<few_shot_examples>
Example E-Commerce Product Showcase Pacing:
"hook": {
  "audio": "I finally found the only travel backpack you will ever need for 7-day trips without checked baggage fees.",
  "visual": "Fast-paced unboxing transition where the backpack is dropped onto a table, instantly unzipping to reveal 5 organized packing cubes.",
  "duration": 4
},
"cta": {
  "audio": "We just restocked in matte black. Click the link in bio to grab yours before it sells out again!",
  "visual": "Speaker wearing the sleek backpack at an airport terminal, smiling and pointing down towards the link in bio overlay.",
  "duration": 5
}
</few_shot_examples>

personal_branding_example.name: Personal Branding & Creators Few-Shot Example
personal_branding_example.template:
<few_shot_examples>
Example Personal Branding Storytelling Pacing:
"hook": {
  "audio": "5 years ago, I quit my corporate job with $800 in my savings account. Here is what nobody tells you about starting over.",
  "visual": "Vlog-style handheld selfie shot walking down a bustling city street, speaking with authentic vulnerability and eye contact.",
  "duration": 4
},
"value": {
  "audio": "Your network is not about who you know. It is about who you have genuinely helped without asking for anything in return.",
  "visual": "Montage of speaking on stage, collaborating with mentors, and working late at a coffee shop laptop.",
  "duration": 8
}
</few_shot_examples>
